properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let now our hearts burn with a flame A fire consuming all for Your Son's holy Name And with the heavens we declare You are our King

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We love You Lord, we worship You You are our God, You alone are good You asked Your Son to carry this The heavy cross, our weight of sin I love You Lord, I worship You Hope which was lost, now stands renewed I give my life to honour this The love of Christ, the Saviour King

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let now the weak say I have strength By the Spirit of power that raised Christ from the dead Let now the poor stand and confess Oh my portion is in Him and I'm more than blessed

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let now Your church shine as the bride That You saw in Your heart as You offered up Your life Let now the lost be welcomed home By the saved and redeemed those adopted as Your own
